repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

weapon ARTILLERY_PROJECTILE WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
   launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
   end_launch_computer
end_weapon

platform_type ARTILLERY_BATTERY_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   weapon MAIN_GUN 100 ARTILLERY_PROJECTILE
end_weapon

platform_type TARGET_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform_type COMMANDER_GROUP_TYPE WSF_GROUP
   processor cmdr_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR

      script void SetTask(WsfPlatform aPlatform,
                          WsfTrack    aTrack)
         string weaponName = aPlatform.WeaponEntry(0).Name();
         WsfWeaponTask task = WsfWeaponTask.Create("TIME_ON_TARGET", weaponName);
         task.SetQuantity(1);
         task.SetCommDevice("perfect");
         task.SetAssignee(aPlatform.Name());
         AssignTask(aTrack, task);
      end_script

      execute at_time 1.0 sec absolute
         WsfPlatform target = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("red_target");
         WsfTrack targetTrack = target.MakeTrack();
         targetTrack.SetAuxData("IMPACT_TIME", 300.0);
         PLATFORM.SetCurrentTarget(targetTrack);
         foreach(WsfPlatform subordinate in PLATFORM.Subordinates())
         {
            SetTask(subordinate, targetTrack);
         }
      end_execute

      script void on_task_complete(WsfTask aTask)
         writeln("Task ", aTask.TaskId(), " assigned to ", aTask.Assignee(), " complete.");
      end_script

   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform commander_group COMMANDER_GROUP_TYPE
   side blue
   comm perfect WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
   end_comm
end_platform

platform battery_1 ARTILLERY_BATTERY_TYPE
   side blue
   parent commander_group
   route
      position 30.65n 104.05e altitude 100 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform battery_2 ARTILLERY_BATTERY_TYPE
   side blue
   parent commander_group
   route
      position 30.70n 104.08e altitude 100 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform red_target TARGET_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.68n 104.12e altitude 150 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/time_on_target_fires.aer
end_event_pipe

csv_event_output
   file output/time_on_target_fires.csv
end_csv_event_output

end_platform_type
end_time 600 sec
